#   the strategies below still carry the signal-bar vs next-bar-open mismatch.
#   Policy is fix-on-touch: when any of these is next re-run, remove
#   stop_price/tp_price from check_entry return and let engine fallback compute.
# The Stage-0.56 guard (warn-mode by default) will fire on each of these.
